2023-24 UC Santa Barbara Gauchos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 16-15 (9-11, 7th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Joe Pasternack

PS/G: 75.4 (118th of 362)

PA/G: 73.5 (235th of 362)

SRS: -3.19 (196th of 362)

SOS: -3.01 (215th of 362)

ORtg: 108.4 (139th of 362)

DRtg: 105.8 (240th of 362)
